axioms.name: Operational Reality
axioms.statement: An event becomes operationally real when a decision produces cost, trace, and temporal exposure.

axioms.name: Decision
axioms.statement: A decision occurs when an agent selects one possibility among multiple alternatives.

axioms.name: Cost
axioms.statement: Every real decision generates cost in the form of resources, risk, sacrifice, or irreversible change.

axioms.name: Trace
axioms.statement: A trace is an observable effect that allows the reconstruction of an event.

axioms.name: Time
axioms.statement: Time exposes events to verification, persistence, and possible decay.

axioms.name: Operational Sequence
axioms.statement: Operational reality emerges through the sequence: Decision → Cost → Trace → Time.
